common.tagline: Record it. Transcribe it. Understand it.

account.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your account, all recordings, transcripts, and summaries. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteError: Couldn't delete your account. Please try again.

landing.heroTitle: Hours of audio, summarized in minutes.
landing.heroSubtitle: Record live or upload a file. Summarex transcribes it, surfaces the key points, and turns long recordings like meetings, lectures, interviews, and podcasts into something you can skim and share.
landing.heroLiveTranscript: "...team scheduled a Monday 10:00 meeting for Q3 planning..."
landing.featuresTitle: From raw audio to clear next steps.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Four steps, one workflow. From a long recording to something you can actually use.

record.title: Record or upload
record.description: Capture audio in the browser or drop a file. MP3, WAV, M4A, WebM. All handled.

transcribe.title: Accurate transcripts
transcribe.description: Clean, multilingual transcripts you can read, search, and copy in seconds.

summarize.title: Smart summaries
summarize.description: Decisions, action items, sentiment, and key quotes are pulled out automatically.

share.title: Share with one link
share.description: Generate a public read-only view your team can open without an account.

flows.title: One app, two workflows.
flows.subtitle: Get a full AI summary or just a clean transcript, whichever the moment calls for.

summarize.title: Summarize
summarize.description: Upload or record audio and get a structured summary with an overview, decisions, action items, and key quotes. Or summarize a transcript you already have.

transcribe.title: Transcribe
transcribe.description: Just need the words? Get a clean, multilingual transcript you can read, search, and copy, then summarize it later if you want.

landing.demoTitle: What the AI actually gives you.
landing.demoSubtitle: A real-looking example so you know what to expect on the other side.

demoTranscript.line1Text: Quick reset before we dive in. This is Q2 planning, and I want to walk away with three decisions today.
demoTranscript.line2Text: The pricing experiment landed at +14% conversion. I'd vote we roll it to 100% next week.
demoTranscript.line3Text: Agreed. And Maya, can you own the announcement email? I'll handle the dashboard updates.
demoTranscript.line4Text: Done. Let's lock the rollout for Tuesday and revisit churn metrics in two weeks.

landing.demoOverviewText: Q2 planning sync covering the pricing experiment results and rollout plan. Strong alignment on next steps.
landing.demoDecision1: Roll the pricing change to 100% of users on Tuesday.
landing.demoDecision2: Revisit churn metrics in two weeks.
landing.demoAction1Task: Send the rollout announcement email to all customers.

mobile.title: Take Summarex with you.
mobile.subtitle: Record, transcribe, and summarize on the go. Our iOS and Android apps are on the way, with longer recordings and Pro features built for mobile.

landing.finalCtaTitle: Stop scrubbing audio. Start finding what matters.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Free during beta. No credit card. No setup.

auth.toSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in

auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email first. Check your inbox for the activation link.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.passwordUpdatedBody: Your password has been changed and you are now signed in.
auth.resetLinkInvalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new reset link.

dashboard.title: Your recordings
dashboard.subtitle: Every recording you've captured or uploaded, searchable and ready to revisit.
dashboard.emptyDescription: Record audio or upload a file, and it'll appear here once processing is done.
dashboard.emptySearchDescription: Nothing matches that search. Try a different title or clear the box to see everything.
dashboard.deleteConfirmBody: "{{title}}" and its transcript, summary, and audio file will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.

recording.title: Start a recording
recording.subtitle: Record live from your browser or upload audio you already have. Either way works.
recording.recordHint: Tap the mic to start. Pause or stop anytime.
recording.uploadHint: Drop in an audio file or pick one from your computer.
recording.permissionDeniedHelp: Enable the mic for this site in your browser settings, then try again.

recording.invalidFile: Unsupported format. Use MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, OGA, OPUS, or WebM.
recording.fileTooLarge: That file is over 25 MB. Try a smaller one.

summarize.title: Summarize audio
summarize.subtitle: Record live or upload a file. Summarex transcribes it and pulls out the key points like decisions, action items, and more.
summarize.pickerSubtitle: Pick one of your transcripts and turn it into a summary. No need to re-upload audio.
summarize.pickerEmpty: No transcripts waiting for a summary. Transcribe some audio first, then come back here.

transcribe.title: Transcribe audio
transcribe.subtitle: Record live or upload a file to get an accurate, searchable transcript. Add a summary later, whenever you want.

meeting.regenerateConfirmBody: We'll re-run the summary on the existing transcript. The current summary will be replaced.
meeting.summarizeCtaBody: Turn this transcript into an overview, decisions, action items, and key quotes, all powered by Claude.
meeting.deleteConfirmBody: "{{title}}" and its transcript, summary, and audio file will be permanently removed. This can't be undone.
meeting.transcriptPlainNotice: Plain transcript. Open the audio to skip to specific moments.

processing.title: Processing your recording
processing.subtitle: Hang tight, this usually takes 1–3 minutes.

share.title: Share this recording
share.description: Anyone with this link can open "{{title}}" without signing in.
share.revokeConfirm: This will invalidate the existing link. Anyone holding it will lose access.
share.disclosure: Read-only view of the transcript and summary. No audio file is shared.

shared.title: Shared recording
shared.expiredOrInvalid: This share link is invalid or has been revoked.

errors.networkError: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.

contactPage.intro: Have a question, feedback, or need help? Reach out and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.

privacy.betaBanner: Beta. Placeholder content, not legal advice

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.body: Summarex is currently in beta. This policy describes how we handle your data while you use our service. We keep it simple and honest: your data is yours.

dataCollected.heading: Data We Collect
dataCollected.body: We collect your account email address, the transcripts and summaries we generate from your audio, and basic usage metadata such as timestamps and file sizes. Audio you upload or record is processed transiently and is permanently deleted from our storage as soon as the transcript and summary are generated.

howWeUseIt.heading: How We Use Your Data
howWeUseIt.body: Your data is used solely to provide the Summarex service, transcribing your audio and generating summaries. We do not sell your data or use it for advertising.

thirdParties.heading: Third-Party Providers
thirdParties.body: Summarex relies on the following providers to function. Your audio content is sent to these services for processing: Supabase (authentication and file storage), ElevenLabs Scribe (audio transcription), Anthropic Claude (AI summaries).

retention.heading: Data Retention
retention.body: We do not retain your original audio. As soon as processing finishes, the audio file is permanently deleted from our storage, and only the transcript and summary remain. Those are kept until you delete them or close your account, and deleting a recording permanently removes its transcript and summary.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.body: You can delete any recording at any time from your dashboard. To delete your entire account and all associated data, contact us at the email below.

terms.betaBanner: Beta. Placeholder content, not legal advice

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.body: Summarex is a beta service provided free of charge. By using Summarex, you agree to these terms. The service is provided as-is with no guarantees of availability, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose.

account.heading: Account
account.body: One account per person. Keep your credentials secure, since you are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.body: Do not upload content you do not have the rights to share. Do not upload illegal, harmful, or non-consensual recordings. We reserve the right to remove content that violates these rules.

aiAccuracy.heading: AI Accuracy
aiAccuracy.body: Transcripts and summaries are generated by AI and may contain errors or omissions. Do not rely on them for legal, medical, financial, or other critical decisions without independent review.

availability.heading: Service Availability
availability.body: Summarex is a beta service and may experience downtime, data loss, or interruptions at any time. We provide no uptime guarantees or SLA.

termination.heading: Termination
termination.body: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms at any time without prior notice.

liability.heading: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: The service is provided "AS IS" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages arising from your use of Summarex.

governingLaw.heading: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Turkey. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of Turkey.
